"'''Nightsaber'''" is a mini adventure for the [[New Republic era]], published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website. It was written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and published on [[November 20]], [[2003]]. It followed the mini adventure "[[Rebel Jedi]]."

==Publisher's summary==
It's hard enough to capture a rogue [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] out to end the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] single-handedly. But when the heroes wind up on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], a world in the grip of an Imperial plot, the sith really does hit the fan. This [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] mini adventure can be played on its own or as a sequel to last month's "Rebel Jedi."

"Nightsaber" is intended for four player characters of 15th level, set about 12 years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The heroes should be at least sympathetic to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], but they don't need to be actual [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. The adventure assumes that the heroes would be concerned about an escaped rogue Jedi -- concerned enough to visit the world of Dathomir to apprehend him.

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}

==Continuity==
[[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] is incorrectly described as a [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] although he is still an admiral in [[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]], seven years later.
